name: 毕业季
description: 致那些逝去的青春，致敬我的小学所以同学，我永远不会忘记那个2021的夏天
xml:
import pygame,sys
pygame.init()
screen = pygame.display.set_mode((450,640))
pygame.display.set_caption("我们毕业了")
bg = pygame.image.load("w3.jpg")
#####
bg = pygame.transform.scale(bg,(450,640))
mf1=pygame.font.SysFont("kaiti",50)
##
pygame.mixer.music.load("see you again.mp3")
pygame.mixer.music.set_volume(0.6)
pygame.mixer.music.play(-1)
mf2=pygame.font.SysFont("kaiti",30)
mf3=pygame.font.SysFont("kaiti",28)
mf4=pygame.font.SysFont("kaiti",34)
mt1=mf1.render("毕",True,(125,125,125))
mt11=mf1.render("业",True,(125,125,125))
mt111=mf1.render("季",True,(125,125,125))
mt2=mf2.render("bì yè lē",True,(125,125,125))
mt3=mf3.render("GRADUATION",True,(125,125,125))
mt33=mf3.render("SEASON",True,(125,125,125))
mt4=mf4.render("人世间最珍贵的,",True,(125,125,125))
mt44=mf4.render("莫过于真诚的友情,",True,(125,125,125))
mt444=mf4.render("深切的怀念,",True,(125,125,125))
mt4444=mf4.render("幽香的小花，开在深谷......",True,(125,125,125))
mt44444=mf4.render("相知是天意 相识是人意 相加便是友谊",True,(125,125,125))
mt444444=mf4.render("有情便有意 我们能聚在一起",True,(125,125,125))
mt4444444=mf4.render("因为心有灵犀。",True,(125,125,125))

while True:
    for event in pygame.event.get():
        if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
            pygame.quit()
            sys.exit()
    screen.blit(bg,(0,0))
    screen.blit(mt1,(150,103))
    screen.blit(mt11,(210,103))
    screen.blit(mt111,(270,103))
    screen.blit(mt2,(160,65))
    screen.blit(mt3,(170,159))
    screen.blit(mt33,(220,187))
    screen.blit(mt4,(90,219))
    screen.blit(mt44,(30,274))
    screen.blit(mt444,(90,329))
    screen.blit(mt4444,(30,380))
    screen.blit(mt44444,(90,440))
    screen.blit(mt444444,(30,500))
    screen.blit(mt4444444,(90,560))
    pygame.display.update()
